title: Leaf
body:
![LEAF MOD](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/073abe8d8ea3a3acb3e1cc007427edc9f1d0f84c.png)

Adds simple thing that can improve you expierence.

Leaf 1.0.5 and above need create mod to work.

**Features:**
- Nettle
- Pink Slime
- Sweet Nettle
- Sweet nettle seeds
- Sweet cream
- Sweet Cream in a bowl
- Tea cup
- Uncooked nettle tea
- Nettle Tea
- Nettle Salad
- Wave Quartz
- Dirt Fossil
- Ancient Fossil
- Liquid Nitrogen
- Cracked Stone
More will be avible in the future.

This mod has translation to 🇵🇱

Please note. Version 1.0.1 can contain bugs.
